claim.rawText:
Visit Summary
Community Family Clinic

Patient: Jane Q. Smith
Date: June 14, 2026

This document is a short clinical visit summary. It does not include insurance service lines, billed amounts, payment amounts, patient responsibility, claim adjustment reason codes, or appeal instructions.

Assessment:
The patient was seen for a cough and fever. Follow up with primary care if symptoms worsen.

patientFacingSummary: Your claim has been processed. Your current patient responsibility is $0.00.
appealLetter: No appealable denials were identified on this claim.
